items.name_cn:
Genuine Grade, High Version
This miniature Toujours vertical handbag is a new arrival from the 2025 Fall Collection, stylish and practical. Crafted from white calfskin, it features oversized quilted stitching. The spacious internal compartment can hold various daily items. It features a slender leather drawstring closure for secure storage, and a light gold-finished metal CD Lock letter D turn-button clasp on the adjustable sides to elevate the style. The top leather handle comes with a detachable leather shoulder strap, allowing you to carry it by hand, on the shoulder, or crossbody.
Model 2834
Dimensions 13×15×12cm

Genuine Grade, High Version
[Top Tier Original Order Denim Blue D💙Medium Size] Dior book tote shopping bag
This Book Tote bag is inspired by Creative Director Maria Grazia Chiuri and is a flagship product embodying Dior aesthetics. It can hold various daily items, featuring a new interpretation of the Bayadere pattern mixed with the D-Stripes pattern embroidery, offering a more fashionable look. The front is adorned with the "Christian Dior" logo, fully reflecting Dior's exquisite craftsmanship.
Style No.: 1286
Dimensions: 36 x 27.5 x 16.5 cm (L x H x W)
Spacious interior, fits 1 15-inch laptop, 1 clutch, 1 wallet, 1 mobile phone, sunglasses, and lipstick

items.name_cn:
Genuine leather
Small Classic Calfskin Puzzle Bag 3001B
24cm
The Puzzle Bag is Jonathan Anderson's first tote for LOEWE. The rectangular shape and precise cutting technique create Puzzle's unique geometric lines. This small bag is made of classic calfskin with overlapping edges.
The small Puzzle bag can hold a large wallet, phone, and sunglasses
Shoulder, crossbody, hand, or clutch carry
Detachable, adjustable strap
Zipper closure with calfskin pull
External zip pocket and internal slip pocket
Customizable with straps and personalized charms
Herringbone cotton canvas lining with Anagram embossing

🔥 Medium calfskin Anagram Tote handbag, linen patchwork tote features💥 No flashy designs, simple and practical type🌻 The design of the long and short shoulder straps looks quite good, the size is quite suitable, not too big🌹 Easily meets daily needs. In addition to the regular classic shoulder strap😻, it also features a unique woven handle❤️, adding a lot of stylishness and design sense to the simple look. The bag body is embossed with the iconic Anagram logo🌺, the recognizability and fashion sense are spot on😘, and it is comfortable and photogenic😍. Can be used with a longer calfskin top handle or a shorter handmade woven handle🌼. This size version is made of calfskin👜. The front is decorated with a large Anagram💋. items.name_cn:
Genuine leather
Crossbody bag Date Red
Loє❤️wє New Arrival, the ultimate crossbody bag!
A must-have for fashionistas to look cool when going out~
The ever-popular Puzzle-derived puzzle hobo!
It sparked a lot of interest among bag lovers as soon as it appeared
The puzzle hobo inherits the classic geometric bag silhouette
Overall slimmer and sleeker
The wide strap looks more premium and stylish
Looks great handheld or worn on the shoulder!
Don't let its size fool you
The softness of Nappa calfskin makes the bag lightweight and incredibly spacious
Super practical for daily wear, simply excellent!

items.name_cn:
Genuine leather
New
Model 1773 23-17-5.5 (includes extended leather shoulder strap)
Mini Nappa Lambskin Flamenco Clutch
The Flamenco Clutch, first released in the 1970s, features a drawstring closure and a signature twisted knot. The Flamenco Purse has been cleverly redesigned with a delicate knotted top and a soft, sensual draped silhouette. This version is crafted from soft Nappa lambskin.
Crossbody or shoulder carry
Detachable, adjustable shoulder strap
Subtle magnetic closure
Suede lining
LOEWE hot stamping
): Gold
Material: Lambskin
Weight: 0.2 kg
